description: You are a software developer at a developer tools company. A colleague left mid-project, leaving an internal data querying tool called 'SimpleQL' partially implemented. The tool queries JSON datasets using a SQL-like domain-specific language. Complete the implementation of the five missing stub functions in lexer.py, parser.py, and evaluator.py within /home/ga/workspace/simpleql/ according to the specifications in GRAMMAR.md. The task is successful when all tests in test_simpleql.py pass.
